items.blurb: Cooper Flagg On Scoring Career-High 51 Points: 'The Basket Feels Big' — Cooper Flagg scored a career-high 51 points in the Dallas Mavericks' 138-127 loss to the Orlando Magic on Friday night. Flagg, who shot 19-of-30 from the field, also became the youngest player in league history to score 50 points. "It's always fun getting into that type of mode," said Flagg after the game. items.title: Cooper Flagg's historic scoring night can't get Mavericks a win
items.blurb: Cooper Flagg's historic scoring night can't get Mavericks a win — Cooper Flagg became the first teenager to score 50 points in an NBA game Friday. That wasn't enough to get the Dallas Mavericks a win.

items.title: NBA Highlights: Magic 138, Mavericks 127
items.blurb: NBA Highlights: Magic 138, Mavericks 127 — Wendell Carter posted 28 points on 50 per cent shooting, while Desmond Bane added 27 points and three steals as the Orlando Magic earned a 138-127 win over the Dallas Mavericks. Cooper Flagg tallied a new career-high with 51 points in the loss.
